# 使用 Mediabunny 获取视频尺寸

entries.en-US: Mediabunny can extract the width and height of a video file. It works in browser, Node.js, and Bun environments.
entries.zh-Hans: Mediabunny 可以提取视频文件的宽度和高度。它适用于浏览器、Node.js 和 Bun 环境。

entries.en-US:
```tsx
const dimensions = await getVideoDimensions("https://remotion.media/video.mp4");
console.log(dimensions.width);  // e.g. 1920
console.log(dimensions.height); // e.g. 1080
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
const dimensions = await getVideoDimensions("https://remotion.media/video.mp4");
console.log(dimensions.width);  // e.g. 1920
console.log(dimensions.height); // e.g. 1080
```

entries.en-US: For local files, use `FileSource` instead of `UrlSource`:
entries.zh-Hans: 对于本地文件，请使用 `FileSource` 而非 `UrlSource`：
